hero.headline: Building practical AI systems that are reliable, scalable, and useful.
hero.description: I design and ship AI solutions across agentic workflows, LLM orchestration, and applied machine learning. I focus on clarity, performance, and real product value.

trends.title: Latest AI and Software Trends
trends.description: A curated snapshot of current developments shaping AI-first software in 2026.

items.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 pushes NeMo-centered AI infrastructure
items.summary: GTC 2026 emphasizes enterprise AI factories, accelerated computing, and NeMo-based agent systems as core software infrastructure.

items.title: AutoResearch highlights autonomous model-improvement loops
items.summary: AutoResearch demonstrates practical autonomous experimentation pipelines where agents iterate on model code and keep only better runs.

items.title: Gemini moves deeper into software workflows
items.summary: Google's latest Gemini Workspace updates show AI capabilities becoming native workflow layers rather than standalone chat utilities.

items.title: Copilot platform shifts toward stronger agent controls
items.summary: Recent GitHub changelog updates show rapid iterations on Copilot model strategy, coding-agent controls, and enterprise usage visibility.

items.title: Economic usage telemetry becomes an AI product signal
items.summary: The Anthropic Economic Index frames real-world AI usage patterns as a strategic input for product planning and model deployment decisions.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: A focused toolkit for building and deploying modern AI applications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Selected work with measurable outcomes and clear technical ownership.

items.title: Kayak Simulation Agent
items.summary: Autonomous travel-booking simulation with decision routing and orchestration.
items.details: Designed an end-to-end workflow for request handling, tool selection, and response validation. The system improved consistency and reduced manual handling for repetitive operations.

items.title: Abdominal Trauma Detection
items.summary: Multi-modal deep learning pipeline for organ-level trauma classification.
items.details: Built a classification pipeline combining image and metadata signals. Benchmarked model quality, improved inference flow, and prepared outputs for practical review and decision support.

items.title: Hate Speech Detection Research
items.summary: Text classification research with model comparison and publication output.
items.details: Evaluated multiple models for toxic text detection and built a repeatable NLP preprocessing flow. Documented results with accuracy and F1 score to support transparent model selection. This work was formally published on ResearchGate.
